name: codex-flows-monorepo
description: Codex app-server clients, flow automation, workspace backend tools, and repo-native workspace operations.

scripts.build: bun run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-flows build && bun run --filter @peezy.tech/flow-runtime build && bun run --filter @peezy.tech/flow-backend-convex build && bun run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-opencode-go-router build && bun run --filter @workspace/ui build && bun run --filter codex-app-cli build && bun run --filter codex-discord-bridge build && bun run --filter codex-workspace-backend-local build && bun run --filter codex-workspace-voice-gateway build && bun run --filter codex-flow-runner build && bun run --filter web build && bun run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-flow-docs build
scripts.check:types: bun run --workspaces check:types && bun run docs:check
scripts.test: bun run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-flows test && bun run --filter @peezy.tech/flow-runtime test && bun run --filter @peezy.tech/flow-backend-convex test && bun run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-opencode-go-router test && bun run --filter codex-workspace-backend-local test && bun run --filter codex-workspace-voice-gateway test && bun run --filter codex-flow-runner test && bun run --filter codex-app-cli test && bun run --filter codex-discord-bridge test && bun run --filter web test
scripts.release:check: bun run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-flows release:check && bun run --filter @peezy.tech/flow-runtime release:check && bun run --filter @peezy.tech/flow-backend-convex release:check
